definition: The nearest unswept external liquidity level in the direction of current bias. This is WHERE price is heading — your TP target.
depends_on: market_structure (swing points create the liquidity levels)
daily_bias (directional filter for which DOL to target)

identification_rules.step_1_determine_bias: Use daily_bias to determine bullish or bearish direction
identification_rules.step_2_map_unswept_levels: Identify all unswept external liquidity in the bias direction
identification_rules.step_3_rank_by_proximity: Nearest unswept level = primary DOL (TP1). Next = secondary DOL (TP2).
identification_rules.step_4_check_confluence: DOL at session level (PDH/PDL/PWH/PWL) or IPDA level = higher confidence

tier_3_moderate: Swing highs/lows from current dealing range

tp3_extended.action: Only for swing trades held overnight

viability_check.minimum_rr: DOL must be at least 2R from entry to justify the trade
viability_check.obstruction_check: No major opposing DOL between entry and target (e.g., don't go long if PWH sits between entry and DOL)
viability_check.freshness: DOL that has been tested 2+ times without sweep loses potency — prefer untested levels

bridge_integration.score_impact: Valid DOL alignment adds +5 to ICT score
bridge_integration.tp_setting: TP1 = nearest DOL, TP2 = secondary DOL when available
bridge_integration.skip_condition: No identifiable DOL within 3R = SKIP trade (no clear target)
